text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, everyone! It's starting! Hurry up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a summer festival tonight, and everyone
decides to go see a certain event.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
By the way, today's event is listed as a motorcycle
"drag race." Might I ask what that is?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It'll be a race down a straight 400-meter track.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Usually they're super intense and go by in a flash,
but this one's just some festival sideshow. Who
knows how authentic it'll be?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nah. It's probably gonna be some lame, low-level
race.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It'll probably be old dudes on their restaurants' junky delivery bikes. I'm talkin' that kinda low-level...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vroom, vroom, VROOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? The sound of that engine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The roar we're hearing sure doesn't sound like a dinky little delivery bike.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vroom, vroom, VROOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! What's goin' on here?! They can't be for
real! They all look like amateurs...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But look at those bikes! Hot damn! And this one...
This one's got me floored!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon after, the race begins. A showdown of speed
so fierce, you wouldn't think it only lasts ten
seconds.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa, they're crazy! That's gotta be a new record! The motorcycles were all like graaahhh at the end!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Cough... Cough... Oh my, all this smoke. It's a little concerning, actually.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Only one left... Will they make it? Will they?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VROOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They made it! Whoa, seriously?! To win by just
0.2 seconds is crazy!

text_block_list.name: Drag Racer
text_block_list.text:
Agh, damn! Ah well, I guess that was payback for
last year.

text_block_list.name: Drag Race Winner
text_block_list.text:
Sure was! Maybe it was something different about
the grip on your tires. Anyway, let's go get a
drink!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wow... For one summer... For just these ten
seconds, these people...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That was siiick! Who knew the boonies had
festivals this raw?
choice_data_list: That was a pretty close race.
That was a pretty close race.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sure was. And it really hit me while I was watchin'
it that I don't wanna lose. I wanna shine too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That speed... That wildness! I'll never forget it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the drag race was the summer treasure
that Vodka was looking for. Soon after...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeahhh! Now it's our turn! Teio! McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wanna compete for a flash of coolness too with
some festival games! Which should we start with?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're so simple, Vodka. You were acting so
bored in the beginning, too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
A flash of coolness? Oh, I know! We could do the
shooting game! Or maybe fishing? What else is
there?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You decide, Trainer. What game should we
compete in?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look around at the signs. A chance for a flash of
coolness... What would be good for that?
choice_data_list: A battle of luck at the raffle!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Those little tea snacks? How do you make a
contest outta that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Vodka, look! Those aren't slices, they're
full-on bricks!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Look, look! They're ginormous! Why would they even make these?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wh-whaaa?! No way! They're like boulders!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Imagine the torture if they're filled with bean
paste too. Can you even pick 'em up?!
choice_data_list: How's that for your challenge, Vodka?
How's that for your challenge, Vodka?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I guess I can't turn it down! This is my
summer to shine!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll show ya I've got just as much power as those
drag racers!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aughhh! Gahhh, this is so heavyyy! Can you even
call this cake?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's so big, I can't see where I'm goin'! Whoa there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka stubbornly carries the extremely heavy
cake boulder. Seems like she's getting a fine
workout.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A raffle? That sounds nice. That kinda thing really does start and end in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's do it! Everyone pick one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They each pick a raffle ticket, and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I won the Fusion Robot DX. Is that a good
prize?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I got a toy crown! Nice! I'll wear it for the rest of
summer camp. ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Leftover firework ash?! This one's a
total dud!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Augh, wait! One more time! I'll show you what a
flash of coolness looks like!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka continues to draw ticket after ticket for
the raffle. She blows all her pocket money doing
it, but she's got guts to keep going, if nothing
else.
